title: psyllium maris-mortui
intro: Psyllium maris-mortui, also known as the "dead sea psyllium," is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a mucilaginous herb that has been traditionally used to support digestive health, with its primary medicinal property being its ability to form a protective gel-like barrier in the stomach and intestines. The health benefits of Psyllium maris-mortui include improved bowel regularity, reduced inflammation, and enhanced overall gut health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in supplement form, capsules, or as a powder, often combined with other herbs to support digestive balance and promote healthy bowel function.
